# Juan Valentin Alducin Vázquez

> Senior Software Engineer · AI-native Development. 10+ years in backend engineering, integrating
> Generative AI / LLMs (Claude, Gemini, OpenAI) as the central copilot of the SDLC and championing
> Spec-Driven Development (SDD/OpenSpec). Based in CDMX, Mexico.

This file summarizes the profile for AI agents and LLMs. Source of truth: the CV PDF and index.html.

## Profile
- Role: Senior Software Engineer, AI-native Development
- Location: Mexico City (CDMX), Mexico
- Languages: Spanish (native), English (B1)
- Email: valentin.alducin88@gmail.com

## How I work (AI-native)
- Spec-Driven Development (proposal → specs → design → tasks → apply → archive); the spec is the source of truth.
- AI as SDLC copilot: spec generation, static code analysis, automated debugging, RCA/post-mortems, documentation.
- Impact metrics: ~40% faster review cycles, 80% autonomous N1 incident resolution, first response under 10 minutes, incident resolution under 2 hours.

## Core stack
- Languages: Python, PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL
- Frameworks: Django, Flask, FastAPI, React, Node.js
- Cloud/Serverless/BaaS: AWS (Lambda, RDS, S3, Step Functions, EventBridge, EC2, CloudWatch), Serverless Framework, GitHub Actions, Supabase, Azure (base), GCP (base)
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SAP HANA SQL, DynamoDB
- AI & GenAI: Claude API, OpenAI API, Gemini API, Anthropic SDK, Prompt Engineering, LLM Integration, AI Agents, RAG, Agentic Workflows, Amazon Bedrock, OpenSpec/SDD

## Experience
- Podemos Progresar (Sep 2025 – present) — Backend Engineer & AI Specialist (Fintech). SDD, AI across the SDLC, AWS Serverless, n8n. Built Enkoth (serverless webhook platform, shipped to production).
- Redsis (Jan 2022 – Sep 2025) — Software Engineer → Tech Lead. GK POS multi-country Go-Live (Peru, Colombia, Bolivia), REST APIs, ETL, team leadership.
- Softtek (Mar 2017 – Jan 2022) — Software Engineer. SAP ERP/HANA, ETL, SAP BO dashboards, AMS support, Scrum (98% SLA).

## Featured projects
- Fidello — Loyalty Card System: multi-business digital loyalty, roles (Owner/Manager/Employee), mobile-first QR, JWT, realtime WebSockets, multi-tenant RLS, QR tokens (60s TTL + SHA-256 fingerprint). 100% SDD/OpenSpec. Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, Supabase, PL/pgSQL, Edge Functions (Deno), Vitest.
- Enkoth — full serverless webhook platform (AWS Lambda, Step Functions, EventBridge), shipped to production. Stack: Python, FastAPI, Serverless Framework, PostgreSQL RDS.
- dataMasterGK — Excel → XML → SFTP processing with admin panel and logging. Stack: Python, Flask, SQLite, Paramiko, Docker.

## Education
- Master's in DevOps — Universidad IEU (2024 – present)
- Computer Systems Engineering — Instituto Tecnológico de Orizaba (2006 – 2011)
- Advanced English — Quick Learning (in progress)
